# OctoAcme — Role Handoff Checklist

Use this checklist whenever a key project role transitions between individuals (e.g., PM change, Release Manager rotation, Security Lead coverage).

**Project:**
**Role being handed off:**
**Outgoing person:**
**Incoming person:**
**Handoff date:**
**Overlap period (if any):**

---

## 1. Context Transfer

| Item | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Project one-pager and charter reviewed | ☐ | |
| Current project status and health explained | ☐ | |
| Active sprint / milestone scope reviewed | ☐ | |
| Key decisions and decision log reviewed | ☐ | |
| Open action items transferred or reassigned | ☐ | |

## 2. Stakeholder Introductions

| Item | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Stakeholders notified of role change | ☐ | |
| Introductions made to key contacts | ☐ | |
| Communication channels (Slack, email lists) updated | ☐ | |
| Calendar invites transferred (standups, syncs, etc.) | ☐ | |

## 3. Risk & Issue Hand-Off

| Item | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Risk register reviewed and transferred | ☐ | |
| Open escalations handed off and owners updated | ☐ | |
| Incident runbook and on-call details shared | ☐ | |
| Security Lead briefed (for security-sensitive handoffs) | ☐ | |

## 4. Tool & Access Transfer

| Item | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Project board access granted to incoming person | ☐ | |
| Repo / doc folder access confirmed | ☐ | |
| CI/CD and deployment tool access granted (if applicable) | ☐ | |
| Old access revoked for outgoing person | ☐ | |
| Shared credentials or keys rotated (if applicable) | ☐ | |

## 5. Documentation Updates

| Item | Status | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Project docs updated to reflect new role owner | ☐ | |
| RACI matrix updated | ☐ | |
| Contact list / team roster updated | ☐ | |
| Release readiness checklist ownership updated (if applicable) | ☐ | |

## 6. Knowledge Transfer Sessions

| Session | Date | Attendees | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| Role overview walkthrough | | | ☐ Scheduled / ✅ Done |
| Open items deep-dive | | | ☐ Scheduled / ✅ Done |
| Stakeholder meet-and-greet | | | ☐ Scheduled / ✅ Done |
| Shadow / paired work session | | | ☐ Scheduled / ✅ Done |

## 7. Sign-Off

| Role | Name | Sign-off | Date |
|---|---|---|---|
| Outgoing | | ☐ | |
| Incoming | | ☐ | |
| Project Manager (if different) | | ☐ | |

---

**Handoff Notes / Outstanding Items:**

> Use this space for anything that doesn't fit the checklist above.

---

*For role descriptions and responsibilities, see [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md).*
*For role ownership by phase, see [Ownership & RACI Matrix](../octoacme-ownership-and-raci.md).*
